summary: Frontend-only smoke test of the new AiReady section on Home and Services pages. All acceptance criteria pass — section renders with correct headline, 6 quick-win cards, 4 reassurance cards, valid CTA links (Calendly, WhatsApp, /services/custom-ai), zero console errors, all existing routes still work, and mobile (375px) renders in a single column with no horizontal overflow.
critical_code_review_comments: AiReady.jsx is well-scoped (~200 lines) and reuses siteConfig/colorMap correctly.
Good use of data-testid on all interactive and key elements.
External CTAs correctly use target=_blank with rel=noreferrer.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 verified the AiReady section. Verified: data-testid='ai-ready-section' on both / and /services; ai-win-0..5 all present; ai-reassure-0..3 all present (Start tiny, Friendly pricing, Pays for itself fast, Your data stays yours); ai-ready-calendly→https://calendly.com/your-studio/intro, ai-ready-whatsapp→https://wa.me/15551234567..., ai-ready-learn-more→/services/custom-ai. Mobile 375px: no horizontal overflow, all 6 cards share left=20px (single column). Routes /, /work, /work/1, /services, /services/custom-ai, /process, /contact, /previews all load with 0 console errors.
